arts.ttl: Ornstein drops Arsenal BOMB: England star is surprise Williams Plan B
arts.sum: Athletic Club star Nico Williams is Mikel Arteta's top target for the left wing after Arsenal opted against making a concrete move for him last summer. Quizzed about Arsenal's pursuit of a left-winger in a Q&A session, the journalist revealed that the Gunners are among the clubs who admire Newcastle star Anthony Gordon.

Los Meringues are looking to bolster their defensive ranks after a series of injuries and lack of signings have depleted their depth in that part of the pitch. arts.sum: Arsenal defender Oleksandr Zinchenko has been linked with a move away from the club at the end of the season, and Borussia Dortmund are keen on securing his signature. arts.ttl: Ben White injury sidelines him as Timber's fitness concerns Arsenal
arts.sum: Ben White misses Arsenal's match against Brentford due to a training injury. Thomas Partey fills in defensively with Jurrien Timber unfit to start. Arteta hopes White will return for the Champions League tie against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice girlfriend, Chelsea snub, West Ham deal, Frank Lampard offer and Arsenal transfer
arts.sum: The 26-year-old midfielder scored two brilliant free-kicks at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night, leading Arsenal to a 3-0 win over Real Madrid in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinal. arts.sum: It showcased exactly how, in the five-and-a-half years since Arteta took over as Arsenal's head coach, he has taken a struggling football club to the pinnacle of European football with back-to-back Champions League quarter-final appearances. "Listen, the relationship between me and Pep is incredibly good," said the former Arsenal midfielder in 2020.
